input.log_excerpt: Living End cascades into Living End on T3 with only 4 cyclers in graveyard and an empty board.  Reanimates 4 small creatures; opponent has Lightning Bolt + Galvanic Discharge.  T4: opponent kills two creatures, swings for lethal next turn.  AI's turn_planner counts the summoning-sick creatures as attackers in its decision.

expected.observed_symptom: Living End cast with insufficient graveyard fuel; turn_planner counts summoning-sick creatures as attackers
expected.failing_test_rule: cascade payoff not cast when graveyard fuel below mininum reanimation threshold
